comments.body: @cevich Looking at the diff, `automation_images` now has a Cirrus `quay_io_images_task`. Could you confirm that this is a resolution for #2110, please?

Confirmed.

We need `FEDORA_NAME: "fedora-38"` -> `FEDORA_NAME: "fedora-39ß"` here, or just remove all references (makes updating a bit easier).

Thanks!

I see no uses of `FEDORA_NAME`, so maybe that value can be removed completely.

[ref](https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2150#issuecomment-1773185437)
> I sent an e-mail about it. Don't worry, I'm not bitter. IIRC It's only referenced in for the task names, so should be simpler to strip it out. But I don't interact with this repo. enough to know if having the number show up in the task name is helpful/not.
